name: apohara-agentguard
description: Deterministic, offline, no-model safety hook + local seccomp+Landlock sandbox + input firewall for Claude Code. Headline differentiator: structural Bash parsing that closes the 3 bypasses naive fixed-list gates miss (variable aliasing, base64 smuggling, pipe/structure-aware destructive detection).

hook.description: Run as a Claude Code PreToolUse / PostToolUse / UserPromptSubmit / SessionStart hook. Reads stdin JSON, emits a permission-decision JSON, exits 0 (Allow/Warn/Ask) or 2 (Block deny).

check.description: Evaluate a single Bash command against the anti-bypass gate. Prints `allow`/`warn`/`block` to stdout, exits 0 or 2.

scan.description: Scan stdin content through the input firewall. Prints verdict, exits 0 or 2.

ask.description: Run the full decision pipeline (gate + policy engine) on a single command. Operator introspection surface — see the verdict before relying on it. Prints `allow`/`warn`/`block`/`ask`.

sandbox.description: Run a command inside the local seccomp + Landlock sandbox. Three permission tiers (read_only / workspace_write / danger_full_access).

mcp.description: Serve the gate + firewall as MCP tools (`check_command` / `scan_prompt`) over stdio JSON-RPC.

installation.binary: Pre-built binaries for 7 targets (x86_64/aarch64 Linux gnu+musl, x86_64/aarch64 macOS, x86_64 Windows) are published in the GitHub Releases. SLSA Build L3 signed.
installation.minimum_requirements: Linux: kernel >= 5.13 with Landlock enabled (lsm=landlock). macOS/Windows: gate + path-guard + firewall work; sandbox subcommand fails closed.
